constraints: Rollback plan and trusted clock receipt must be review-only evidence.
Neither artifact may grant runtime enablement authority.

Runtime enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, terminal closure, connector authority, filesystem writes, network access, secret serialization, and success claims remain denied.
Submitted evidence refs and review packet must count eleven repo-local refs and preserve operator approval as the single missing input.
non_goals: Do not grant runtime enablement authority.
Do not execute rollback or disablement.
Do not dispatch or invoke a worker.
Do not emit or append runtime receipts.
problem_statement: Runtime enablement review still required rollback and trusted clock evidence before operator approval could be the only remaining input.
success_criteria: Rollback plan and trusted clock receipt validate as review-only evidence.
Submitted evidence refs and review packet include eleven repo-local evidence refs.
Operator runtime enablement approval remains the only missing input.
Focused validators, focused pytest, protocol manifest validation, SDLC artifact validation, schema validation, and whitespace checks pass.
